items.title: Raducanu pulls out of Wimbledon due to injury
items.summary: Emma Raducanu has withdrawn from Wimbledon due to injury the night before her opening match.

items.title: England handed fresh World Cup boost as Congo’s ‘living statue’ lucky charm is barred from USA
items.summary: ENGLAND scored a World Cup boost after their Congo opponents’ mystic “living statue” superfan was denied a US visa. Bizarre spiritual guide Michel Kuka Mboladinga claims he can transmit “emotional stamina” to Congo players and is revered as their lucky charm. He stands totally still for entire 90 mi
